messages.content:
# Executive Summary

## Available Tables

You have access to the following tables in the database:

| Table Name                  | Description                                      |
|-----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| accounts                    | Information about client accounts                 |
| cash_forecasts              | Forecasting cash flows for future periods        |
| collateral_positions         | Details on collateral held against transactions   |
| funding_plans               | Plans for funding sources and amounts             |
| fx_exposures                | Foreign exchange exposure details                 |
| interest_rate_swaps         | Information on interest rate swap agreements      |
| intraday_liquidity_events   | Events related to liquidity within the day       |
| investment_securities        | Data on investment securities held                |
| liquidity_buffers            | Details on liquidity buffers maintained           |
| liquidity_sweeps            | Information on liquidity sweep transactions       |
| nostro_balances             | Balances held in nostro accounts                  |
| repo_transactions           | Details on repurchase agreement transactions      |
| stress_test_scenarios       | Scenarios for stress testing financial resilience  |
| sweep_executions            | Executions of liquidity sweeps                    |
| transactions                | Records of financial transactions                 |
| treasury_positions           | Positions held in treasury operations             |

If you have any specific queries or need further insights, feel free to ask!
